Car.MetaTag: Volkswagen Golf 2.0 TDI BlueMotion Tech GTD Euro 6 (s/s) 5dr Diesel Manual Grey
Car.Description: Available now is this stunning and high-performance 2014 (64) Volkswagen Golf 2.0 TDI BlueMotion Technology GTD, a sporty hatchback offering GTI-inspired styling with outstanding diesel economy and strong performance. Powered by the punchy 2.0 TDI diesel engine, the GTD delivers impressive torque, excellent MPG, and a refined yet sporty driving experience — perfect for motorway cruising or everyday driving. ✅ GTD Performance • Excellent MPG • Sporty Hatchback Key Features Include: • GTD styling package • Sports seats with iconic tartan interior • Touchscreen infotainment system • Bluetooth and media connectivity • Cruise control • Dual-zone climate control • Front and rear parking sensors • Alloy wheels • Multifunction steering wheel • Electric windows and mirrors • ISOFIX • LED daytime running lights Drives superb — smooth, powerful, and responsive. No warning lights or mechanical issues. • Recently serviced and inspected • MOT to be renewed at point of sale ✅ Drive away today – reserve VN64 KHJ with a refundable £100 deposit (TandCs apply). 🚚 Nationwide delivery available at competitive rates. ⸻ Why Buy from AFM | Affordable Motors Billingham?
